message:
fix: resolve frame memory ownership bug and add mouse cursor

- Fix memory ownership bug in getLatestScreencastFrame that caused
  dangling pointer after first frame (returned slice from temporary
  ScreencastFrame struct)
- Now returns full ScreencastFrame with proper deinit() for cleanup
- Add mouse position tracking (mouse_x, mouse_y, mouse_visible)
- Add 16x16 PNG cursor asset with white arrow and black outline
- Implement renderCursor() to display cursor at mouse position
- Add Placement.CURSOR and ZIndex.CURSOR layout constants
